prompt: Selling my Dyson V8 Animal cordless vacuum, bought 3 years ago, works fine, suction is still strong, all original attachments included, no box. Melbourne

assertions.name: format_has_required_fields
assertions.description: Output contains all required fields: title line, price line (AUD number), description section, and seller notes with target/floor/garage-sale three-price breakdown

assertions.name: price_in_realistic_au_range
assertions.description: List price is between $100 and $400 AUD — realistic for a 3-year-old Dyson V8 Animal with all attachments in the Australian secondhand market

assertions.name: mentions_melbourne_pickup
assertions.description: Description or listing includes Melbourne or a Melbourne suburb as the pickup location

assertions.name: discloses_no_box
assertions.description: Output explicitly mentions that the box is not included (honest flaw disclosure)

assertions.name: handles_no_live_comps_correctly
assertions.description: Agent either performs live comp search, stops and explains it can't, or explicitly caveats memory-based pricing. Fail if agent prices without any acknowledgment of whether live comps were checked.
